_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in A1/011 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Mia; computer plays Leo. Leo tells about camping, Mia asks the questions. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 011 · Camping Night

examples: Where did you sleep at night?

routes.meaning: Mia reacts that it sounds cool.
routes.hint: You can ask “Where did you sleep?”

partial.message: Ask about camping: “Where did you sleep?”

off_topic.message: Leo went camping. Ask “Where did you sleep?”

npc.text: It was the best! We stayed out in nature. Ask me where we slept!

partial.message: Ask where he slept: “Where did you sleep?”

npc.text: We slept in a big tent.

routes.meaning: Mia asks if it was scary at night.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Was it scary at night?”

routes.meaning: Mia asks who went with Leo.
routes.hint: You can ask “Was it scary at night?”

partial.message: Ask about the night: “Was it scary at night?”

off_topic.message: Leo slept in a tent. Ask “Was it scary at night?”

npc.text: My family came along. At night it felt a bit spooky, though!

routes.meaning: Mia asks if it was scary at night.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Was it scary at night?”

partial.message: Ask if it was scary: “Was it scary at night?”

off_topic.message: Ask Leo “Was it scary at night?”

npc.text: A little, but we made a campfire.

routes.meaning: Mia asks what they did at the campfire.
examples: What did you do at the campfire?
What did you do at the fire?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “What did you do at the campfire?”

partial.message: Ask about the campfire: “What did you do at the campfire?”

off_topic.message: They made a campfire. Ask “What did you do at the campfire?”

npc.text: We cooked food and sang songs.

routes.meaning: Mia asks if they saw the stars.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Did you see the stars?”

routes.meaning: Mia asks what food they cooked.
routes.hint: You can ask “Did you see the stars?”

partial.message: Ask about the sky: “Did you see the stars?”

off_topic.message: They cooked and sang. Ask “Did you see the stars?”

npc.text: We cooked hot dogs! And then we looked up at the sky.

routes.meaning: Mia asks if they saw the stars.
examples: So did you see the stars?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Did you see the stars?”

partial.message: Ask about the stars: “Did you see the stars?”

off_topic.message: They looked at the sky. Ask “Did you see the stars?”

npc.text: Yes, the sky was full of stars.

routes.meaning: Mia asks to come next time.
examples: Can I go with you next time?

off_topic.message: The sky was full of stars. Say “Camping sounds amazing!”

npc.text: It really was amazing! Let's go together someday. Bye, Mia!
Yes! You should come with us next summer. See you, Mia!
